translation: to like / dislike someone (as a person)
example_sentence: Me cae muy bien tu amigo, es muy simpático.
example_translation: I really like your friend, he's very nice.

translation: it doesn't feel right to me / I have a bad feeling about it
part_of_speech: verb phrase (gut feeling expression — uniquely Mexican)
example_sentence: No sé, no me late ese plan.
example_translation: I don't know, that plan doesn't feel right to me.

translation: they let him go / they fired him (euphemism)
example_sentence: Después de cinco años, le dieron las gracias.
example_translation: After five years, they let him go.

translation: it's intense / it's tough / it's awesome (context-dependent)
example_translation: The exam was brutal / really tough.

translation: I'm not convinced / I don't buy it
example_sentence: La explicación no me convence del todo.
example_translation: The explanation doesn't fully convince me.

translation: it seems strange to me / something seems off
example_sentence: Se me hace raro que no haya contestado todavía.
example_translation: It seems strange to me that she hasn't answered yet.

translation: I took an instant dislike to him/her
example_sentence: No sé por qué, pero me cayó gordo desde el primer momento.
example_translation: I don't know why, but I took an instant dislike to him from the first moment.

part_of_speech: verb phrase (colloquial, vulgar — register awareness required)
example_sentence: Cuidado con lo que le dices, anda pedo.
example_translation: Be careful what you say to him, he's drunk.

translation: really? / no way! / is that so? (Mexican expression of surprise)
example_sentence: ¿A poco ya terminaste toda la tarea?
example_translation: Really? You already finished all the homework?

translation: a ton of / loads of (Mexican colloquial for 'a lot')
example_sentence: Había un chorro de gente en el metro.
example_translation: There were loads of people on the metro.

translation: I think it's really cool / I think it's great
example_sentence: Me parece padrísimo que hayas aprendido tanto.
example_translation: I think it's really great that you've learned so much.
